title: About Eighty Five Eleven
text: Eighty Five Eleven is a streetwear and sneaker boutique based in Swefieh Village, Amman, Jordan, established in 2021. We are advocates of sneaker and streetwear culture, bridging humans and the culture under one roof. Individually we each bring our own style and vision; combined we connect collectors, casual wearers, and the wider community to the movement. The shop functions as both a retail space and a hub for authentication, customization, and care services. Whether you're hunting grails, consigning heat, or restoring a beat-up pair, the Eighty Five Eleven roof has you covered.

title: Store location
text: Our physical store is located in Swefieh Village, Amman, Jordan, on Saleh Ali Zaki street. Swefieh Village is a popular lifestyle and dining destination in west Amman, easy to reach by car or taxi. You can find us on Google Maps at https://maps.google.com/?cid=15121294295697539889. Walk-ins are welcome during opening hours for shopping, drop-offs, authentication checks, and consignment intake. Parking is available within the Swefieh Village complex.

title: Contact
text: Reach us by email at EightyFiveEleven.8511@gmail.com for general inquiries, consignment, custom orders, and shipping questions. Our address is Saleh Ali Zaki street, Swefieh Village, Amman, Jordan. Follow and DM us on Instagram at @eightyfiveeleven for the fastest replies, drop announcements, and new arrivals. For directions, use our Google Maps listing at https://maps.google.com/?cid=15121294295697539889. You can also visit the store in person during opening hours to talk to the team directly.

title: Sneaker Authentication
text: We authenticate sneakers so you can buy and sell with confidence. Bring in any pair — Jordans, Yeezys, Dunks, Travis collabs, or anything else — and our team will inspect construction, materials, stitching, box, and tags against verified references. Authentication is useful before completing a private resale, accepting a trade, or consigning with us. You'll receive a clear pass/fail verdict with notes on what we checked. Contact the store for current turnaround and pricing.

title: Sneaker Consignment
text: Consign your sneakers with Eighty Five Eleven and let us do the work. We authenticate the pair, photograph it, list it across our channels including in-store and Instagram, handle buyer questions, and pay you out once it sells. Consignment is a good fit for grails, limited collabs, and any pair you want to move at fair market value without dealing with resellers directly. We accept deadstock and worn pairs in good condition. Reach out via email or DM to discuss commission rates and drop off your pair.

title: Sneaker Laundry
text: Our sneaker laundry service deep-cleans your pairs using products and techniques chosen for each material — leather, suede, mesh, knit, or canvas. We handle uppers, midsoles, outsoles, laces, and insoles, lifting stains, yellowing, and grime that household cleaning can't safely reach. Cleaning is a smart step before reselling, consigning, or just bringing a beloved daily back to life. Drop off in store during opening hours. Contact us for a quote based on the pair and condition.

title: Sneaker Restoration
text: Restoration brings tired pairs back to life. Services include sole swaps, midsole re-icing, color restoration on yellowed or faded panels, leather re-dyeing, glue repairs, and stitching fixes. We work on classic silhouettes like Air Jordan 1s, Air Force 1s, Dunks, Air Max, and harder-to-source models too. Restoration is ideal for vintage pairs, beaters with sentimental value, or anything you want to wear again instead of replacing. Bring the pair in for an assessment and a quote.

title: Custom Sneaker Art
text: Get one-of-one hand-painted artwork applied to your sneakers by our custom artists. We work with leather-safe paints and finishes designed to flex and resist cracking with wear. Custom art ranges from full repaints and themed collabs to subtle accents, swoosh edits, and personalized details like names, dates, or logos. Bring your own pair or have us source one — we'll talk through concept, references, and timeline before starting. Contact the store for a quote based on the design's complexity.

title: Custom Orders
text: Can't find the size, colorway, or piece you want in store? We take custom orders for shoes and clothing across the brands we work with. Tell us the exact model, size, and any details, and we'll source it through our network. This service covers heat that's already sold out locally, region-exclusive releases, and apparel sizing that's hard to find in Jordan. Lead times depend on the item — contact the store for an estimate and deposit details before we place the order.

title: Worldwide Shipping
text: We ship worldwide so you can shop Eighty Five Eleven from anywhere. Orders are packed carefully — original boxes protected inside an outer shipping box — and dispatched with tracked international couriers. Delivery times and rates vary by destination; contact us for a quote before placing an order if you need a specific timeline. Customs duties and import taxes are the buyer's responsibility and depend on your country's rules. Reach out by email or Instagram DM to arrange international orders.

title: Nike ID
text: Through our Nike ID (Nike By You) service, we help you design a fully personalized Nike pair from the ground up. Pick the silhouette, then choose colors, materials, and finishes panel-by-panel, with the option to add personal text on supported models. We guide you through what each model allows, place the order on your behalf, and handle shipping into Jordan. This is ideal for one-of-one daily wearers, gifts, and matching sets. Contact the store for current model availability, pricing, and lead times.

title: Opening hours
text: Eighty Five Eleven is open daily from 12:00 PM to 10:00 PM, seven days a week. The same hours apply on weekends — Friday and Saturday — so you can shop, drop off pairs, or pick up consignment payouts whenever it suits you. Hours may shift slightly during public holidays in Jordan and the holy month of Ramadan; check our Instagram @eightyfiveeleven for the latest schedule. Last drop-offs for laundry, restoration, and authentication are accepted up to closing, but earlier visits give the team more time to walk through your pair with you.

title: Social media
text: Instagram is our main channel — follow @eightyfiveeleven for new arrivals, restocks, drop announcements, restoration before-and-afters, and behind-the-scenes from the shop. DMs are the fastest way to ask about specific pairs, sizes, custom orders, or consignment. We also share authentication tips and culture content from the wider streetwear scene. For longer questions, attachments, or anything order-related, email EightyFiveEleven.8511@gmail.com works best. Tag us when you cop a pair and we'll repost the heat.

title: Shipping policy
text: We ship locally across Jordan and worldwide to most destinations. Local Amman orders are usually dispatched same-day or next-day depending on cutoff and courier availability. International orders go out with tracked couriers and timelines vary by region — contact the store for an exact quote before checkout. Customs duties, VAT, and import taxes on international orders are paid by the recipient according to their country's rules. We pack each pair to protect the original box, and you'll receive a tracking number once your order leaves the shop.

title: Brands we carry
text: Our shop floor and online inventory feature a curated mix of sneaker and streetwear brands. On the footwear side we stock Nike — including Air Jordan, Dunk, Air Force 1, and Air Max lines — along with Adidas (Yeezy, Samba, Gazelle, and more). On the apparel and accessories side we carry Supreme drops and a selection of caps and hats. The lineup rotates with each delivery, and limited collabs sell quickly, so follow @eightyfiveeleven for restock alerts. If you don't see what you're after, ask about our custom order service.

title: Authentication promise
text: Every pair sold at Eighty Five Eleven — retail, consignment, or custom-sourced — passes through our in-house authentication process before it reaches you. Our team checks construction, stitching, materials, box labels, size tags, and any model-specific tells against verified references. The same standard applies to pairs we authenticate for outside customers, so you can trust the verdict whether you bought from us or somewhere else. If a pair doesn't pass, it doesn't get sold under our name. This promise is core to how we operate and why the community trusts us with grails.
